title: Honda ICVS Concept (1994–2008)
summary: Honda ICVS Concept “Intelligent Community Vehicle System” emphasising vehicle sharing over owning. 1994 introduction 1996 concepts presented 1998 public test (Japan) 1999 World Good Design award 2002 real world application (Singapore) 2008 discontinued ( Honda Newsroom ) Video: www.youtube.com/watch?v=q3XR8pXminc Archived website: web.archive.org/web/200011…
content:
Honda ICVS Concept “Intelligent Community Vehicle System” emphasising vehicle sharing over owning.

  • 1994 introduction
  • 1996 concepts presented
  • 1998 public test (Japan)
  • 1999 World Good Design award
  • 2002 real world application (Singapore)
  • 2008 discontinued (Honda Newsroom)

  • Video: www.youtube.com/watch?v=q3XR8pXminc
  • Archived website: web.archive.org/web/20001109052600/http://www.honda.co.jp/ICVS/icvs/index.html
